name: TA-65, A Telomerase Activator improves Cardiovascular Markers in Patients with Metabolic Syndrome
summary: A 2018 randomized double-blind crossover TA-65 trial in 40 metabolic-syndrome patients, registered in the full text as ClinicalTrials.gov protocol NCT02531334, reporting higher HDL-C and lower BMI, waist circumference, LDL/HDL ratio, and TNF-alpha during TA-65 treatment compared with placebo.
